name: Minestrone 1
recipeIngredient: 1 small garlic clove - cut in half
1 can 8-10.5 oz red kidney beans - drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4 quart saucepan over medium high heat, in hot olive oil, cook carrot, celery, onion, garlic and green beans until lightly browned (about 15 minutes). Discard garlic.
2. Add water, salt, oregano, cabbage, zucchini, tomatoes and liquid bouillon; over high heat, heat to boiling, stirring to break up tomatoes. Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer for 25 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
3. Stir in macaroni, spinach and beans; cook for an additional 10 minutes or until macaroni is very tender and soup is slightly thickened.
4. Serve with Parmesan cheese sprinkled on top.
